calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion & Motion For Order To Show Cause Why Jay P. Drohan Indiv. Dba Friendly Plumbing Shld Not Be Held In Contempt,
Off Calendar Jul-19-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditor's Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Order To Show Cause Why Jay P. Drohan, Individually, DBA Friendly Plumbing Should Not Be Held In Contempt is granted. Jay P. Drohan, Individually, DBA Friendly Plumbing is ordered to appear before this court in Room 612 on August 30, 2006 at 9 a.m. A copy of this order shall be personally served upon Jay P. Drohan no later than August 15, 2006. (612/EAH) COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn For Award Of Post Judgment Atty'S Fees
Off Calendar Feb-08-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion For Award Of Post Judgment Attorney's Fees is granted in the amount of $1,860. No opposition has been filed. (612/HEWLETT)

Ntc Of Mo To Compel Ans To Post-Judgt Disco
Off Calendar Jan-23-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery: Granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $336.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Aug-15-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion For Assignment of Rights, Restraining Order and Turnover Order is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
